candidate.completion: text me before I start calling spam numbers back.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please text me before I start calling spam numbers back.

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clear and logically grounded: loneliness escalates into treating spam calls as social contact. The pivot phrase is specific and funny, but the sentence is a bit long and lands more as a sharp comic image than a fully polished aphorism.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
